root_text.an8.78:1.1: Tatra kho āyasmā sāriputto bhikkhū āmantesi …pe…
root_text.an8.78:1.2: chahāvuso, dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu alaṁ attano, alaṁ paresaṁ.
root_text.an8.78:1.4: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu khippanisanti ca hoti kusalesu dhammesu;
root_text.an8.78:1.8: kalyāṇavāco ca hoti kalyāṇavākkaraṇo, poriyā vācāya samannāgato vissaṭṭhāya anelagaḷāya atthassa viññāpaniyā;
root_text.an8.78:1.9: sandassako ca hoti samādapako samuttejako sampahaṁsako sabrahmacārīnaṁ.
root_text.an8.78:1.10: Imehi kho, āvuso, chahi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu alaṁ attano, alaṁ paresaṁ.
root_text.an8.78:2.1: Pañcahāvuso, dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu alaṁ attano, alaṁ paresaṁ.
root_text.an8.78:2.3: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu na heva kho khippanisanti ca hoti kusalesu dhammesu;
root_text.an8.78:2.9: Imehi kho, āvuso, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu alaṁ attano, alaṁ paresaṁ.
root_text.an8.78:3.1: Catūhāvuso, dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu alaṁ attano, nālaṁ paresaṁ.
root_text.an8.78:3.3: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu khippanisanti ca hoti kusalesu dhammesu;
root_text.an8.78:3.9: Imehi kho, āvuso, catūhi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu alaṁ attano, nālaṁ paresaṁ.
root_text.an8.78:4.1: Catūhāvuso, dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu alaṁ paresaṁ, nālaṁ attano.
root_text.an8.78:4.3: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu khippanisanti ca hoti kusalesu dhammesu;
root_text.an8.78:4.5: no ca dhātānaṁ dhammānaṁ atthūpaparikkhitā hoti;
root_text.an8.78:4.6: no ca atthamaññāya dhammamaññāya dhammānudhammappaṭipanno hoti;
root_text.an8.78:4.9: Imehi kho, āvuso, catūhi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu alaṁ paresaṁ, nālaṁ attano.
root_text.an8.78:5.1: Tīhāvuso, dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu alaṁ attano, nālaṁ paresaṁ.
root_text.an8.78:5.3: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu na heva kho khippanisanti ca hoti kusalesu dhammesu;
root_text.an8.78:5.9: Imehi kho, āvuso, tīhi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu alaṁ attano, nālaṁ paresaṁ.
root_text.an8.78:6.1: Tīhāvuso, dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu alaṁ paresaṁ, nālaṁ attano.
root_text.an8.78:6.3: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu na heva kho khippanisanti ca hoti kusalesu dhammesu;
root_text.an8.78:6.5: no ca dhātānaṁ dhammānaṁ atthūpaparikkhitā hoti;
root_text.an8.78:6.6: no ca atthamaññāya dhammamaññāya dhammānudhammappaṭipanno hoti;
root_text.an8.78:6.9: Imehi kho, āvuso, tīhi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu alaṁ paresaṁ, nālaṁ attano.
root_text.an8.78:7.1: Dvīhāvuso, dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu alaṁ attano, nālaṁ paresaṁ.
root_text.an8.78:7.3: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu na heva kho khippanisanti ca hoti kusalesu dhammesu;
root_text.an8.78:7.4: no ca sutānaṁ dhammānaṁ dhāraṇajātiko hoti;
root_text.an8.78:7.9: Imehi kho, āvuso, dvīhi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu alaṁ attano, nālaṁ paresaṁ.
root_text.an8.78:8.1: Dvīhāvuso, dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu alaṁ paresaṁ, nālaṁ attano.
root_text.an8.78:8.3: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu na heva kho khippanisanti ca hoti kusalesu dhammesu;
root_text.an8.78:8.4: no ca sutānaṁ dhammānaṁ dhāraṇajātiko hoti;
root_text.an8.78:8.5: no ca dhātānaṁ dhammānaṁ atthūpaparikkhitā hoti;
root_text.an8.78:8.6: no ca atthamaññāya dhammamaññāya dhammānudhammappaṭipanno hoti;
root_text.an8.78:8.7: kalyāṇavāco ca hoti kalyāṇavākkaraṇo, poriyā vācāya samannāgato vissaṭṭhāya anelagaḷāya atthassa viññāpaniyā;
root_text.an8.78:8.8: sandassako ca hoti samādapako samuttejako sampahaṁsako sabrahmacārīnaṁ.
root_text.an8.78:8.9: Imehi kho, āvuso, dvīhi dhammehi samannāgato bhikkhu alaṁ paresaṁ, nālaṁ attano”ti.

translation_text.an8.78:1.2: “Reverends, a mendicant with six qualities is good enough for themselves and others.
translation_text.an8.78:1.4: A mendicant is quick-witted when it comes to skillful teachings.
translation_text.an8.78:1.5: They readily memorize the teachings they’ve heard.
translation_text.an8.78:1.6: They examine the meaning of teachings they’ve memorized.
translation_text.an8.78:1.7: Understanding the meaning and the teaching, they practice in line with the teaching.
translation_text.an8.78:1.8: They’re a good speaker who enunciates well. Their voice is polished, clear, articulate, and expresses the meaning.
translation_text.an8.78:1.9: They educate, encourage, fire up, and inspire their spiritual companions.
translation_text.an8.78:1.10: A mendicant with these six qualities is good enough for themselves and others.
translation_text.an8.78:2.1: A mendicant with five qualities is good enough for themselves and others.
translation_text.an8.78:2.3: A mendicant is not quick-witted when it comes to skillful teachings.
translation_text.an8.78:2.4: They readily memorize the teachings they’ve heard.
translation_text.an8.78:2.5: They examine the meaning of teachings they’ve memorized.
translation_text.an8.78:2.6: Understanding the meaning and the teaching, they practice in line with the teaching.
translation_text.an8.78:2.7: They’re a good speaker. Their voice is polished, clear, articulate, and expresses the meaning.
translation_text.an8.78:2.8: They educate, encourage, fire up, and inspire their spiritual companions.
translation_text.an8.78:2.9: A mendicant with these five qualities is good enough for themselves and others.
translation_text.an8.78:3.1: A mendicant with four qualities is good enough for themselves but not for others.
translation_text.an8.78:3.3: A mendicant is quick-witted when it comes to skillful teachings.
translation_text.an8.78:3.4: They readily memorize the teachings they’ve heard.
translation_text.an8.78:3.5: They examine the meaning of teachings they’ve memorized.
translation_text.an8.78:3.6: Understanding the meaning and the teaching, they practice in line with the teaching.
translation_text.an8.78:3.7: They’re not a good speaker. Their voice isn’t polished, clear, articulate, and doesn’t express the meaning.
translation_text.an8.78:3.8: They don’t educate, encourage, fire up, and inspire their spiritual companions.
translation_text.an8.78:3.9: A mendicant with these four qualities is good enough for themselves but not for others.
translation_text.an8.78:4.1: A mendicant with four qualities is good enough for others but not for themselves.
translation_text.an8.78:4.3: A mendicant is quick-witted when it comes to skillful teachings.
translation_text.an8.78:4.4: They readily memorize the teachings they’ve heard.
translation_text.an8.78:4.5: But they don’t examine the meaning of teachings they’ve memorized.
translation_text.an8.78:4.6: Not understanding the meaning and the teaching, they don’t practice in line with the teaching.
translation_text.an8.78:4.7: They’re a good speaker. Their voice is polished, clear, articulate, and expresses the meaning.
translation_text.an8.78:4.8: They educate, encourage, fire up, and inspire their spiritual companions.
translation_text.an8.78:4.9: A mendicant with these four qualities is good enough for others but not for themselves.
translation_text.an8.78:5.1: A mendicant with three qualities is good enough for themselves but not for others.
translation_text.an8.78:5.3: A mendicant is not quick-witted when it comes to skillful teachings.
translation_text.an8.78:5.4: They readily memorize the teachings they’ve heard.
translation_text.an8.78:5.5: They examine the meaning of teachings they’ve memorized.
translation_text.an8.78:5.6: Understanding the meaning and the teaching, they practice in line with the teaching.
translation_text.an8.78:5.7: They’re not a good speaker. Their voice isn’t polished, clear, articulate, and doesn’t express the meaning.
translation_text.an8.78:5.8: They don’t educate, encourage, fire up, and inspire their spiritual companions.
translation_text.an8.78:5.9: A mendicant with these three qualities is good enough for themselves but not for others.
translation_text.an8.78:6.1: A mendicant with three qualities is good enough for others but not for themselves.
translation_text.an8.78:6.3: A mendicant is not quick-witted when it comes to skillful teachings.
translation_text.an8.78:6.4: They readily memorize the teachings they’ve heard.
translation_text.an8.78:6.5: But they don’t examine the meaning of teachings they’ve memorized.
translation_text.an8.78:6.6: Not understanding the meaning and the teaching, they don’t practice in line with the teaching.
translation_text.an8.78:6.7: They’re a good speaker. Their voice is polished, clear, articulate, and expresses the meaning.
translation_text.an8.78:6.8: They educate, encourage, fire up, and inspire their spiritual companions.
translation_text.an8.78:6.9: A mendicant with these three qualities is good enough for others but not for themselves.
translation_text.an8.78:7.1: A mendicant with two qualities is good enough for themselves but not for others.
translation_text.an8.78:7.3: A mendicant is not quick-witted when it comes to skillful teachings.
translation_text.an8.78:7.4: And they don’t readily memorize the teachings they’ve heard.
translation_text.an8.78:7.5: They examine the meaning of teachings they’ve memorized.
translation_text.an8.78:7.6: Understanding the meaning and the teaching, they practice in line with the teaching.
translation_text.an8.78:7.7: They’re not a good speaker. Their voice isn’t polished, clear, articulate, and doesn’t express the meaning.
translation_text.an8.78:7.8: They don’t educate, encourage, fire up, and inspire their spiritual companions.
translation_text.an8.78:7.9: A mendicant with these two qualities is good enough for themselves but not for others.
translation_text.an8.78:8.1: A mendicant with two qualities is good enough for others but not for themselves.
translation_text.an8.78:8.3: A mendicant is not quick-witted when it comes to skillful teachings.
translation_text.an8.78:8.4: And they don’t readily memorize the teachings they’ve heard.
translation_text.an8.78:8.5: Nor do they examine the meaning of teachings they’ve memorized.
translation_text.an8.78:8.6: Not understanding the meaning and the teaching, they don’t practice in line with the teaching.
translation_text.an8.78:8.7: They’re a good speaker who enunciates well. Their voice is polished, clear, articulate, and expresses the meaning.
translation_text.an8.78:8.8: They educate, encourage, fire up, and inspire their spiritual companions.
translation_text.an8.78:8.9: A mendicant with these two qualities is good enough for others but not for themselves.”
